---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for WORLD GAME
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: jadogeri
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like.

---

## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it.
*Example: "I often find it frustrating when playing world game because My scores are saved, but I cannot log in and view only my game session"*

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see. Include example UI mockups, new endpoint shapes (`/api/...`), or database schema changes if helpful.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Describe them here (e.g., handling this purely in the frontend state vs. adding a new table via Drizzle ORM).

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, API requirements (like additional filters for table in /leaderboard), or screenshots about the feature request here.
